item.title: Gurman：苹果想用眼镜复制 Apple Watch 的成功
item.guid: Gurman：苹果想用眼镜复制-Apple-Watch-的成功
item.description:
Last night, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman revealed in the latest PowerOn newsletter that Apple is planning to enter the eyewear market "in the same way it entered the smartwatch market," targeting the broader traditional eyewear market rather than just competing with smart eyewear manufacturers like Meta. 昨晚，彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 在最新的 PowerOn 新闻通讯中透露，苹果正计划以「进入智能手表市场的方式」切入眼镜领域，将目标对准更广泛的传统眼镜市场，而非仅与 Meta 等智能眼镜厂商竞争。

Apple's smart glasses, internally codenamed N50, were originally planned for release by the end of this year and launch early next year, but have now been postponed until the end of next year . Apple is expected to target the $200 to $500 price range, competing with traditional eyewear brands such as Essilor, Safilo Group, and Warby Parker. 苹果智能眼镜内部代号 N50，原计划今年底发布、明年初上市， 目前已推迟至明年底 。苹果预计瞄准 200 至 500 美元价格区间，与依视路、Safilo 集团及 Warby Parker 等传统眼镜品牌竞争。

Bloomberg, citing World Health Organization data, stated that the global eyewear market has an annual size of about $200 billion, far exceeding the watch market corresponding to the Apple Watch. The report also mentioned that Apple CEO Tim Cook is one of the project's most steadfast supporters, with people close to him calling smart glasses a "priority" during his tenure. 彭博社援引世界卫生组织数据称，全球眼镜市场年规模约 2000 亿美元，远超苹果手表所对应的腕表市场。报道还提到，苹果 CEO Tim Cook 是这一项目最坚定的支持者之一，接近他的人士称智能眼镜是其任期内的「优先事项」。

John Ternus, who will take over as CEO in September, is also deeply involved in the project. The Vision Products Group (VPG) team, responsible for R&D, has been operating under his leadership for the past two years. The first generation of Apple Glasses will feature an oval camera design and offer a variety of colors and frame styles. 即将于 9 月接任 CEO 的 John Ternus 同样深度参与该项目，负责研发的 Vision Products Group（VPG）团队过去两年一直在他的领导下运作。首代苹果眼镜将采用椭圆形摄像头设计，提供多种颜色与镜框风格。

Regarding other product developments, the report states that the hardware for the new Apple TV set-top box and HomePod mini was completed months ago and is currently being used by Apple employees at headquarters. Both products are awaiting the readiness of new Siri and Apple Intelligence features this autumn for a simultaneous launch. 其他产品进展方面，报道称新款 Apple TV 机顶盒与 HomePod mini 的硬件已完成数月，目前正在苹果总部员工中使用，两款产品均等待今秋新版 Siri 与 Apple Intelligence 功能就绪后同步推出。

In addition, Apple has initiated early development work for next year's iOS 28 and macOS 28, internally codenamed "Bell" and "Poppy" respectively, collectively known as "Boppy." 此外，苹果已启动明年 iOS 28 与 macOS 28 的早期开发工作，内部代号分别为「Bell」与「Poppy」，合称「Boppy」。

Gurman reiterated that iOS 27 primarily focuses on minor fixes and improvements, while iOS 28 will be "more important than iOS 27." 古尔曼重申，iOS 27 主要聚焦于小修小补，而 iOS 28 将会「比 iOS 27 更加重要」。

item.title: 曝三星与 OpenAI 定制 AI 芯片项目停滞
item.guid: 曝三星与-OpenAI-定制-AI-芯片项目停滞
item.description:
According to Korean media Greened, Samsung and OpenAI's custom AI chip development project has stalled due to strategic differences. The project originally planned to develop an inference-oriented NPU for OpenAI based on the ARM architecture, with early development already showing progress. 据韩媒 Greened 报道，三星与 OpenAI 的定制 AI 芯片研发项目因战略分歧陷入停滞。该项目原计划基于 ARM 架构，为 OpenAI 研发一款面向推理的 NPU，前期研发已有进展。

Samsung and OpenAI signed multiple cooperation agreements last year, with Samsung SDS collaborating with OpenAI to build AI data centers, and Samsung potentially supplying memory chips to OpenAI. Following the stagnation of the custom chip project, Samsung's recent investment in Anthropic is interpreted by outsiders as another AI client strategy. Korean media also reported that Samsung might turn to manufacturing AI chips for Anthropic. 三星和 OpenAI 去年签署多项合作协议，三星数据系统公司将与 OpenAI 合作建设 AI 数据中心，三星也可能向 OpenAI 供应存储芯片。定制芯片项目停滞后，三星近期投资 Anthropic 的动作被外界解读为另一条 AI 客户路线，韩媒还称三星可能转向为 Anthropic 代工 AI 芯片。

item.title: Apple Music 出现全球性服务中断
item.description:
Apple's official "System Status" page showed that Apple Music experienced a service outage at 23:40 Beijing time on May 29, with some users encountering intermittent connection, playback, or service access issues during use. 苹果官网「系统状态」页面显示，Apple Music 于北京时间 5 月 29 日 23:40 出现服务中断，部分用户在使用过程中遭遇间歇性连接、播放或服务访问异常。

Affected regions included multiple countries and areas such as Australia, Brazil, France, India, Italy, Japan, South Korea, Spain, and the United States. Some users could still open and play content normally. The fault monitoring platform Downdetector also showed related user reports during the same period, with the number of reports subsequently declining. 受影响地区涉及澳大利亚、巴西、法国、印度、意大利、日本、韩国、西班牙及美国等多个国家和地区，部分用户仍可正常打开和播放内容。故障监测平台 Downdetector 同期出现相关用户报告，随后报告数量呈下降趋势。

Real-time information on Apple's system status page showed that the service outage was resolved at 8:30 AM on May 30, lasting approximately 8 hours and 50 minutes. 苹果系统状态页面实时信息显示，该服务中断已于 5 月 30 日上午 8:30 得到解决，持续时间约 8 小时 50 分钟。

item.title: 北大数院「黄金二代」苏炜杰加入 OpenAI
item.guid: 北大数院「黄金二代」苏炜杰加入-OpenAI
item.description:
Su Weijie, a 2007 alumnus of Peking University's School of Mathematical Sciences and a professor of statistics at the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania, announced on the X platform that he has joined OpenAI during his sabbatical and returned to the Bay Area to participate in AI model training. He also stated that he has been promoted to full professor at the Wharton School. 北京大学数学科学学院 2007 级校友、宾夕法尼亚大学沃顿商学院统计学教授苏炜杰在 X 平台宣布，自己已在休假期间加入 OpenAI，并回到湾区参与 AI 模型训练工作。他同时表示，自己已晋升为沃顿商学院正教授。

Su Weijie's research interests include statistical machine learning, high-dimensional inference, large-scale multiple testing, optimization, and privacy-preserving data analysis. The Wharton Statistics and Data Science Department page shows that he was previously an associate professor of statistics and data science, and also an adjunct associate professor of computer and information science. 苏炜杰的研究方向包括统计机器学习、高维推断、大规模多重检验、优化和隐私保护数据分析。沃顿统计与数据科学系页面显示，他此前为统计与数据科学副教授，并兼任计算机与信息科学副教授。

OpenAI President Greg Brockman replied "Welcome to the team" under the relevant post. Su Weijie graduated from Peking University's School of Mathematical Sciences with a bachelor's degree, then went to Stanford University for his Ph.D. in statistics, with research interests covering statistics, machine learning optimization, and theoretical safety of large language models. OpenAI 总裁 Greg Brockman 在相关帖文下回复「欢迎加入团队」。苏炜杰本科毕业于北京大学数学科学学院，后赴斯坦福大学攻读统计学博士，研究方向涵盖统计学、机器学习优化及大语言模型理论安全。

This year, he received the COPSS Presidents' Award, one of the highest honors in the field of international statistics. 今年，他获得考普斯会长奖（COPSS Presidents’ Award），这是国际统计学领域的最高荣誉之一。

item.title: 胡彦斌亲手做了一款粉丝 App，从零学 vibe coding 上线「彦火」
item.guid: 胡彦斌亲手做了一款粉丝-App，从零学-vibe-coding-上线「彦火」
item.description:
Hu Yanbin announced on Weibo yesterday that his fan community app "Yanhuo" has officially launched. He stated that this is the first time he has personally made an app, learning vibe coding from scratch and completing it after repeated refinement. 胡彦斌昨日在微博宣布，其粉丝社区应用「彦火」正式上线。他表示，这是自己第一次亲手做一款 App，从零开始学习 vibe coding，经过反复打磨后完成。

The Yanhuo App is positioned as an exclusive interactive platform between Hu Yanbin and his fans, with features including daily check-ins, points levels, exclusive letters, and tour footprint records. The official download page shows that the iOS version is available on the App Store, and Android users can currently download the APK installation package directly from the official website. 彦火 App 定位为胡彦斌与粉丝之间的专属互动平台，功能涵盖每日打卡、积分等级、专属信件及巡演足迹记录。官方下载页面显示，iOS 版本已在 App Store 上架，Android 用户目前可通过官网直接下载 APK 安装包。

Hu Yanbin mentioned in his Weibo post that he hopes to use this app to "create a place of our own" for fans, enabling various interactive forms such as Q&A, dynamic updates, and performance announcements. He likened the entire development process to "completing a game" and also to the repeated refinement involved in making music. 胡彦斌在微博中提到，他希望借助这款 App 为粉丝「造一个属于我们自己的地方」，实现问答、动态更新、演出通告等多种互动形式。他将整个开发过程比作「游戏通关」，也类比为做音乐时的反复打磨。

Hu Yanbin stated that the app is currently just the starting point, and will continue to iterate and update, welcoming user feedback. 胡彦斌表示，App 目前仅是起点，后续将持续迭代更新，并欢迎用户提出意见。

item.title: MiniMax 启动 A 股上市辅导
item.description: MiniMax announced yesterday on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange that its board of directors has resolved to explore preliminary proposals for issuing RMB-denominated shares, and may consult and negotiate with professional advisors, securities, and regulatory bodies. The company has engaged professional advisors to provide consultation on meeting the listing conditions for the STAR Market and has signed a tutoring agreement. MiniMax 昨日在港交所公告，董事会已决议探究发行人民币股份的初步建议，并可能与专业顾问、证券及监管机构进行咨询和磋商。公司已聘请专业顾问就符合科创板上市条件提供咨询，并签订辅导协议。

item.title: 赛力斯和重庆国资将推新汽车品牌
item.guid: 赛力斯和重庆国资将推新汽车品牌
item.description:
According to "LatePost Auto," Landian Technology, originally controlled by Seres Group, has been renamed Saidou Technology. The largest shareholder has changed to Shaci Zhiyuan, controlled by Chongqing Shapingba State-owned Assets Supervision and Administration Commission, holding 34.5%; Seres's shareholding has decreased to 32.5%. 据《晚点 Auto》报道，赛力斯集团原控股的蓝电科技已更名为赛豆科技，第一大股东变更为重庆沙坪坝国资委控股的沙磁致远，持股 34.5%；赛力斯持股比例降至 32.5%。

It is reported that Saidou Technology will be the legal entity for Seres' new automotive brand. The new brand is positioned as young and sporty, planned for a June launch, and will deeply cooperate with ByteDance's Volcano Engine. The new brand will establish dedicated sales channels, targeting both domestic and international markets. 报道称，赛豆科技将作为赛力斯新汽车品牌的法律主体，新品牌定位年轻、运动，计划 6 月发布，并将与字节跳动旗下火山引擎深度合作。新品牌会组建专门销售渠道，面向国内和海外市场销售。

Earlier this week, various investors in Landian Technology signed an agreement to increase capital and expand shares by approximately 6.671 billion yuan, bringing in new shareholders such as CATL, Bojun Technology, and Xingyu Co., Ltd. Insiders say Saidou Technology will focus on intelligent connected new energy passenger vehicles, integrating AI technology with the automotive industry. 本周早些时候，蓝电科技各出资方签署约 66.71 亿元增资扩股协议，新进宁德时代、博俊科技、星宇股份等股东。知情人士称，赛豆科技将聚焦智能网联新能源乘用车，并融合 AI 技术与汽车产业。

item.title: 算力用电年均新增或超 1000 亿度
item.guid: 算力用电年均新增或超-1000-亿度
item.description:
According to data from the National Energy Administration, by 2025, China has built 42 intelligent computing clusters with a capacity of 10,000 cards each. The total electricity consumption of national computing centers reached 170 billion kilowatt-hours, accounting for 1.6% of the total electricity consumption of society. The average growth rate of electricity consumption for computing in the 8 major hub nodes of the national integrated computing network has been approximately 39.5% in the past three years, higher than the growth rate of total societal electricity consumption. 国家能源局数据显示，2025 年我国已建成 42 个万卡级智算集群，全国算力中心总用电量达 1700 亿千瓦时，占全社会用电量 1.6%。全国一体化算力网络 8 大枢纽节点算力用电近 3 年平均增速约 39.5%，高于全社会用电量增速。

The National Energy Administration estimates that during the "15th Five-Year Plan" period, the national electricity consumption for computing will increase by over 100 billion kilowatt-hours annually, reaching approximately 800 billion kilowatt-hours by 2030, accounting for about 6% of total societal electricity consumption. 国家能源局预计，「十五五」时期全国算力用电量年均新增 1000 亿千瓦时以上，到 2030 年达到 8000 亿千瓦时左右，占全社会用电量约 6%。

The urban samples for data center electricity consumption are already evident. From May 1st to 27th, Shenzhen's data center industry's overall electricity consumption was 273 million kilowatt-hours, a year-on-year increase of 20.12%; electricity consumption by data centers in Guangming District increased by 85.31% year-on-year. In the first four months of this year, Guangdong's total societal electricity consumption was 283.797 billion kilowatt-hours, a year-on-year increase of 8.77%, of which 307 data centers consumed 3.805 billion kilowatt-hours, a year-on-year increase of 18.48%. 数据中心用电的城市样本已经很明显。5 月 1 日至 27 日，深圳数据中心行业整体用电量 2.73 亿千瓦时，同比增长 20.12%；光明区数据中心用电量同比增长 85.31%。广东今年前 4 个月全社会用电量 2837.97 亿千瓦时，同比增长 8.77%，其中 307 家数据中心用电量 38.05 亿千瓦时，同比增长 18.48%。

item.title: 我国发射卫星互联网技术试验卫星
item.guid: 我国发射卫星互联网技术试验卫星
item.description:
According to CCTV News, in the early hours of yesterday, China successfully launched a satellite internet technology experimental satellite into its predetermined orbit using a Long March 2D carrier rocket at the Xichang Satellite Launch Center. 据央视新闻，昨日凌晨，我国在西昌卫星发射中心使用长征二号丁运载火箭，成功将卫星互联网技术试验卫星送入预定轨道。

This satellite is primarily used for technical experimental verification of mobile broadband direct satellite connection, space-ground network integration, and other technologies. This mission also marks the 646th flight of the Long March series of carrier rockets. 这颗卫星主要用于开展手机宽带直连卫星、天地网络融合等技术试验验证。此次任务也是长征系列运载火箭第 646 次飞行。

item.title: 💡 纽约联储主席：AI 正在改变工作，但经济学家岗位仍安全
item.guid: 💡-纽约联储主席：AI-正在改变工作，但经济学家岗位仍安全
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, at the annual economics conference in Reykjavik, Iceland, New York Fed President John Williams gave a clear response to concerns about AI's impact on employment, becoming the most optimistic Fed official at the meeting. 据彭博社报道，在冰岛雷克雅未克举行的经济学年会上，纽约联储主席约翰·威廉姆斯对 AI 冲击就业的担忧给出了明确回应，成为本次会议中立场最为乐观的联储官员。

Williams drew laughter from the audience with the remark, "The demand for macroeconomists remains strong," and then clarified his core judgment: the productivity gains brought by AI will not lead to long-term structural unemployment. 威廉姆斯以一句「宏观经济学家的需求依然旺盛」引发听众笑声，随即阐明他的核心判断：AI 带来的生产率提升不会导致长期结构性失业。

History tells us that productivity can continuously increase, and living standards can steadily rise, without causing structural unemployment. I do not believe we will face long-term structural unemployment.

He believes that AI can accelerate data processing and preliminary analysis, but economic judgment still requires identifying causal relationships, understanding institutional contexts, and placing model conclusions within a policy framework. 他认为，AI 可以加速数据处理和初步分析，但经济学判断仍需要识别因果关系、理解制度背景，并把模型结论放进政策语境。

He also pointed out that the main adjustment path for the labor market is retraining and skill upgrading, rather than large-scale layoffs. He specifically mentioned that current university graduates have generally integrated AI tools into their daily work, and this generation of the workforce is already ahead of their predecessors in adaptability. 他同时指出，劳动力市场的主要调整路径是再培训与技能升级，而非大规模裁员。他特别提到，当前高校应届毕业生已普遍将 AI 工具融入日常工作，这一代劳动力在适应能力上已领先于前辈。

People hired straight out of college today are already using AI tools daily.

item.title: 英伟达首款自研芯片 Windows PC 本周亮相
item.guid: 英伟达首款自研芯片-Windows-PC-本周亮相
item.description:
According to Axios, Nvidia is expected to officially launch its first Windows PC products featuring its chips as the main processors this week. The related announcements will be made at the Computex trade show and Microsoft's Build developer conference in San Francisco. 据 Axios 报道，英伟达预计于本周正式推出首批搭载其芯片作为主处理器的 Windows PC 产品。相关发布将分别在 Computex 贸易展和旧金山微软 Build 开发者大会上亮相。

Sources confirmed to Axios that the first batch of Nvidia-powered PCs will include Microsoft's own-brand Surface series, as well as products from third-party manufacturers including Dell. Concurrently, Microsoft is also expected to launch new software at the event to help users more conveniently run AI agents on local Windows devices to complete tasks. 据知情人士向 Axios 确认，首批英伟达芯片 PC 将涵盖微软自有品牌 Surface 系列，以及包括戴尔在内的第三方厂商产品。与此同时，微软也预计将在发布会上推出新软件，帮助用户在本地 Windows 设备上更便捷地运行 AI 智能体完成工作任务。

Nvidia recently posted on X (formerly Twitter) to preview a "new era of PCs"; Microsoft's Head of Windows, Pavan Davuluri, also posted on X, hinting that "new content will be released to developers at next week's Build conference, but it's not a new operating system." 英伟达日前曾在 X 发帖预告「PC 新时代」；微软 Windows 负责人 Pavan Davuluri 也在 X 上发文暗示，「有新内容将在下周 Build 大会面向开发者发布，但不是新版操作系统」。

Analyst Carolina Milanesi (Current Strategies) stated that Nvidia's entry into the PC market is beneficial for the industry as a whole and is also expected to benefit Qualcomm, which uses a similar chip architecture. Milanesi also pointed out that Nvidia's greater opportunity remains in data centers, with the PC business being more of a beneficial complement. 分析师 Carolina Milanesi（Current Strategies）表示，英伟达进入 PC 市场对行业整体是利好，也有望带动同样采用类似芯片架构的高通受益。Milanesi 同时指出，英伟达的更大机遇仍在数据中心，PC 业务更多是一项有益的补充。

item.title: 特斯拉为 Model Y 推出原厂手动遮阳帘
item.guid: 特斯拉为-Model-Y-推出原厂手动遮阳帘
item.description:
Tesla China has launched an original manual retractable sunshade for the Model Y, priced at 1499 yuan, aiming to solve the "scorching roof" problem that owners have long complained about. It officially goes on sale this Thursday. 特斯拉中国为 Model Y 推出原厂手动伸缩遮阳帘，定价 1499 元，意在解决长期被车主吐槽的「车顶暴晒」问题。本周四正式开售。

The product uses the same fabric as the original headliner, paired with a metallic-textured handle, maintaining overall consistency with the interior style. The sunshade is constructed with an integrated frame and a retractable roll-up design. The official statement claims extremely low noise and simple installation. 该产品采用与原车顶棚相同的织物面料，配合金属质感拉手，整体与内饰风格保持一致。遮阳帘由一体化框架构成，搭配卷轴式设计，官方称噪音极低，安装操作简便。

The accessory is fixed in the panoramic roof gap with front and rear pins, supports push-pull operation, and features a two-stage independent adjustment function. It can be installed as a whole when the rear seats are folded down. Tesla states that the product has passed full-vehicle airbag deployment tests and multiple road tests. Currently, this accessory is only suitable for Model Y vehicles produced in February 2025 or later. 配件通过前后插销固定于天幕缝隙，支持推拉操作，具备两段式独立调节功能，后排座椅放倒后可整体安装。特斯拉表示，该产品已通过整车气囊点爆试验及多重道路测试。目前该配件仅适用于 2025 年 2 月及之后生产的 Model Y 车辆。

item.title: 三星 Galaxy Watch9 可能推出 Classic 版本
item.description:
Android Authority discovered suspected codenames for the next-generation Galaxy Watch in Wear OS update code, including Fresh 9, Wise 9, and Project V2. The report suggests that these three sets of codenames may correspond to Galaxy Watch9, Galaxy Watch9 Classic, and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, respectively. Android Authority 在 Wear OS 更新代码中发现了下一代 Galaxy Watch 的疑似代号，包括 Fresh 9、Wise 9 和 Project V2。报道认为，这三组代号可能分别对应 Galaxy Watch9、Galaxy Watch9 Classic 和 Galaxy Watch Ultra 2。

Samsung has not released a Classic version for every generation of Galaxy Watch previously. Galaxy Watch5 and Watch7 did not have Classic versions, while Watch6 and Watch8 retained the Classic line. Current information suggests that Samsung may break this convention. 三星此前并非每代 Galaxy Watch 都推出 Classic 版本。Galaxy Watch5 和 Watch7 没有 Classic，Watch6 和 Watch8 则保留了 Classic 线，目前消息指向三星可能打破这一惯例。

New settings related to "Raise to Speak" also appeared in the code. GSMArena states that this may mean the Galaxy Watch9, or more Wear OS watches, will gain the Raise to Speak feature previously exclusive to Pixel Watch. 代码中还出现了全新「抬腕对话」相关的新设置。GSMArena 称，这可能代表 Galaxy Watch9，或更多 Wear OS 手表，将获得此前 Pixel Watch 独占的抬腕对话功能。

The new watches are expected to be released alongside the Galaxy Z Flip8 and Z Fold8 series, with a release date anticipated on July 22. 新表预计会与 Galaxy Z Flip8、Z Fold8 系列一同发布，发布时间预计为 7 月 22 日。

item.title: 黑鲨首款 AI 耳夹式耳机开售
item.guid: 黑鲨首款-AI-耳夹式耳机开售
item.description:
Black Shark's first AI smart earphones, the "Fengming Ear Clip Earphones Pro," went on sale yesterday, with an official price of 369 yuan. 黑鲨首款 AI 智能耳机「凤鸣耳夹式耳机 Pro」昨日开售，官方标价 369 元。

These ear clip earphones weigh 5g per ear, feature a titanium alloy memory steel wire C-shaped bridge that passed 10,000 bending tests; they are equipped with Bluetooth 6.0, support LHDC 5.0 protocol, use a 13mm titanium-plated composite diaphragm, and offer three sound effects: gaming, music, and cinema, supporting ENC call noise reduction. 这款耳夹式耳机单耳重 5g，采用钛合金记忆钢丝 C 型桥，通过 1 万次弯折测试；搭载蓝牙 6.0，支持 LHDC 5.0 协议，使用 13mm 镀钛复合振膜，并提供游戏、音乐、影院三种音效，支持 ENC 通话降噪。

AI features include simultaneous interpretation and dialogue translation. In terms of battery life, a single use lasts about 9 hours, with a total battery life of about 30 hours when paired with the charging case; it also supports IPX5 water resistance and dual-device switching. AI 功能包括同声传译和对话翻译。续航方面，单次使用约 9 小时，搭配充电仓总续航约 30 小时；同时支持 IPX5 防水和双设备切换。

item.title: 胖东来停止销售新包装矿泉水
item.guid: 胖东来停止销售新包装矿泉水
item.description:
Pang Dong Lai released an early statement, admitting a major design flaw in the new packaging of DL Drinking Natural Mineral Water, announcing that the product would cease sales after selling out yesterday, and will complete a redesign in approximately 3 months, with a planned launch in September. 胖东来提前发布说明，承认新包装 DL 饮用天然矿泉水在设计上存在重大失误，宣布该产品于昨日销售完毕后停止销售，并将在约 3 个月内完成重新设计，计划于 9 月上市。

According to the statement, it was discovered before the launch of Pang Dong Lai's new packaged mineral water that its bottle shape might bear a visual resemblance to existing products of the same category on the market. 据说明披露，胖东来新包装矿泉水在上市前已发现，其瓶型外观与市面上现有同品类产品存在视觉近似的可能。

Pang Dong Lai stated in the explanation that this situation was a "major design error." Based on respect for and protection of intellectual property originality, and to avoid impacting the market of the other brand, the group's product committee discussed and decided to stop selling this batch of products. The original packaged DL Drinking Natural Mineral Water will continue to be sold normally. 胖东来在说明中表示，此次情况系「设计方面的重大失误」，基于对知识产权原创的尊重与保护，同时为避免对对方品牌市场造成影响，经集团商品委员会商议，决定停止销售该批次产品。原包装 DL 饮用天然矿泉水将继续正常销售。

item.title: 多地取消固定分时电价转向现货价格
item.guid: 多地取消固定分时电价转向现货价格
item.description:
Beike Finance reported that Guizhou, Hubei, Shaanxi, and other regions have recently successively promoted adjustments to the time-of-use electricity pricing mechanism, with fixed peak and off-peak periods beginning to loosen. Han Fang, Deputy Director of the Planning and Development Department of the China Electricity Council, stated that this marks a continued progression of the electricity pricing mechanism from "plan-led" to "market-formed." 贝壳财经报道称，贵州、湖北、陕西等地近期相继推进分时电价机制调整，固定峰谷时段开始松动。中电联规划发展部副主任韩放表示，这标志着电价形成机制从「计划主导」向「市场形成」继续推进。

The draft for comments released by Guizhou on May 16 added a midday "off-peak electricity" period during non-winter months and expanded the peak-to-off-peak price difference to 120%. Beike Finance mentioned that after the rapid growth of new energy installations like wind and solar power, the traditional practice of dividing peak and off-peak periods based on fixed load curves has become difficult to adapt to the new power system. 贵州 5 月 16 日发布的征求意见稿在非冬季新增中午「谷电」时段，并将峰谷价差扩大到 120%。贝壳财经提到，风电、光伏等新能源装机快速增长后，传统以固定负荷曲线划分峰谷时段的做法，已经难以适配新型电力系统。

The report points out that compared to fixed time-of-use prices, spot price signals are more precise and flexible. Abolishing fixed time-of-use electricity prices can facilitate price transmission between wholesale and retail markets, guiding users to adjust their electricity consumption behavior based on real-time price changes. 报道指出，相比固定时段分时价格，现货价格信号更加精准、灵活。取消固定分时电价，能够畅通批发市场与零售市场之间的价格传导，引导用户根据实时价格的变化调整用电行为。

Han Fang also clarified that the current policy is primarily aimed at industrial and commercial users directly participating in market transactions and does not involve residential, agricultural, or public utility users; residential household electricity prices and time-of-use policies remain unchanged. 韩放同时明确，目前政策主要面向直接参与市场交易的工商业用户，不涉及居民、农业、公用事业用户；居民家庭用电价格和分时政策保持不变。

item.title: 深圳提示网约车市场已总体饱和
item.guid: 深圳提示网约车市场已总体饱和
item.description:
Yicai cited the Shenzhen Municipal Transportation Bureau's April ride-hailing industry operational dynamics, stating that Shenzhen's ride-hailing market is generally saturated, with an average daily order completion rate of approximately 13.01 orders per vehicle across the city. 第一财经援引深圳市交通运输局 4 月份网约车行业运营动态称，深圳网约车市场已总体饱和，全市网约车日均单车完成订单量约 13.01 单。

Shenzhen's transportation department reminds prospective practitioners to rationally assess earnings and to be particularly wary of six types of risks: platforms collecting revenue on behalf of drivers using "work/guaranteed income models," disputes arising from unauthorized intermediaries, "monthly income over 10,000" promotions leading to vehicle return breaches, unlicensed operation scams, high-return traps in car rental contracts, and car rental companies failing to pay insurance premiums on time, leading to insurance invalidation. 深圳交通部门提醒拟从业者理性评估收益，并重点警惕六类风险：平台以「上班 / 保底模式」代收流水、中间商未获授权引发纠纷、「月入过万」宣传与退车违约、无证营运骗局、租车合同高回报陷阱，以及租车公司逾期缴纳保险导致保险失效。

This reminder directly points to the issue of oversupply in local life platforms. The ride-hailing driver pool continues to expand, but the order density per vehicle has dropped to a level that makes it difficult to support high-income expectations. 这条提醒直接指向本地生活平台的供给过剩问题。网约车司机端继续扩容，但单车订单密度已经下降到很难支撑高收入预期的水平。

item.title: 《我的世界大电影》续集定档明年 7 月 23 日
item.guid: 《我的世界大电影》续集定档明年-7-月-23-日
item.description:
According to blogger "Watchmen Hollywood," the sequel to "A Minecraft Movie" has been titled "A Minecraft Movie: Squared" and is set to be released in North America on July 23 next year. Jason Momoa, Jack Black, Danielle Brooks, Jennifer Coolidge, and director Jared Hess will all return, with Kirsten Dunst newly joining the cast. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，《我的世界大电影》续集定名《A Minecraft Movie: Squared》，定档明年 7 月 23 日北美上映。杰森·莫玛、杰克·布莱克、丹妮尔·布鲁克斯、詹妮弗·库里奇及导演杰瑞德·赫斯均将回归，克尔斯滕·邓斯特新加盟出演。

The subtitle, centered on the concept of "squared," continues the visual language of the original block world. The sequel's subtitle font uses a specific color scheme, leading to speculation that this might hint at the plot involving the Ender Dragon. 副标题以「方的平方」为核心概念，延续了原作方块世界的视觉语言。续集副标题字体采用了特定配色，有猜测认为这可能暗示剧情将涉及末影龙。

item.title: 《龙之家族》第三季首集将直接进入海战
item.guid: 《龙之家族》第三季首集将直接进入海战
item.description:
Deadline reported that "House of the Dragon" Season 3 released new footage at the ATX TV Festival, and showrunner Ryan Condal revealed that the first episode of the new season is expected to go directly into the Battle of the Gullet, making it the largest production scale for the series to date. Deadline 报道，《龙之家族》第三季在 ATX TV Festival 放出新片段，主创 Ryan Condal 透露，新季首集预计会直接进入 Gullet 之战，制作规模是该剧目前最大的一次。

Condal introduced that the third season took 314 days to shoot, used over 25 tons of propane, and involved a large number of actors, physical sets, and sea battle scenes. The sea battle in the first episode did not rely entirely on CG, but rather built real ship sets and used a combination of dry and wet pools for filming: ship movements were simulated by mechanical structures, while actions requiring characters to fall into the water and interact with the water were completed in real pools. Condal 介绍，第三季拍摄耗时 314 天，使用超过 25 吨丙烷，涉及大量演员、实体布景和海战场面。首集海战部分并非完全依赖 CG，而是搭建了真实船只布景，并使用干水池与湿水池组合拍摄：船只运动由机械结构模拟，部分需要人物落水和交互水面的动作则在真实水池中完成。

He summarized the core conflict of this season as a Cold War-style standoff where both sides possess "nuclear weapons," and the number, ownership, and usage of dragons will become key to advancing the war. 他把这一季的核心冲突概括为双方都拥有「核武器」的冷战式对峙，龙的数量、归属和使用方式会成为战争推进的关键。
